flavorText: Necromancers command life and death energies, sustaining themselves and ruling undead servants.

features.description: The gold and time to copy Necromancy spells into your spellbook are halved.
Once per turn when you kill one or more creatures with a spell, regain hit points equal to twice the spell's level (or three times if it is a Necromancy spell).
When you cast animate dead, create one extra undead. Your undead add your proficiency bonus to damage rolls.
Gain resistance to necrotic damage, and your hit point maximum cannot be reduced by undead effects.
As an action, target one undead you can see. It must make a Charisma save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier) or fall under your control for 24 hours.
